title: viola tricolor var. arvensis
intro: Viola tricolor var. arvensis, also known as wild pansy or heart's ease, is a variety of the pansy plant that is native to Europe and Asia. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, primarily used to treat digestive issues, such as bloating and indigestion, due to its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Viola tricolor var. arvensis include its ability to soothe stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by infusing the flowers and leaves in hot water or a solvent like ethanol or glycerin.
